suggestions.description: Potential FOUC (flash of unstyled content) on first load
suggestions.fix_required: Optional: Add inline script to index.html to apply data-color-theme before React renders (similar to how next-themes handles .dark class). Current implementation uses useEffect which runs after mount.
suggestions.impact: Minor — causes brief visual flash when page loads with non-zinc theme. Not blocking.

suggestions.description: Mode and color palette buttons lack aria-label and aria-pressed attributes
suggestions.fix_required: Add aria-label="{label}" and aria-pressed={isSelected} to buttons on lines 267-278 and 301-325
suggestions.impact: Minor — buttons already have visible text labels, so screen readers will work. This would enhance accessibility further.

suggestions.description: Preview circles use light mode colors even in dark mode
suggestions.fix_required: Optional: Use computed CSS variables instead of hardcoded HSL values for preview circles (lines 316, 320). Current implementation shows light mode preview (e.g., green 142.1 76.2% 36.3%) but dark mode applies different shade (142.1 70.6% 45.3%).
suggestions.impact: Very minor — PRD explicitly allowed hardcoded values for performance (line 269). This is visual inconsistency, not a bug.

qa_result.verdict_explanation: All critical requirements met, zero bugs found, production build successful, TypeScript clean. Three minor suggestions provided (FOUC mitigation, aria attributes, preview consistency) but none are blocking — all are optimizations that can be addressed in future iterations if desired. Implementation quality is excellent with defensive programming and proper pattern adherence.
